pages.text: $(l)Aether$() — the material residue left by the first Transcendents.$(br2)Millennia after the original Ascension Rite, their mortal forms diffused as raw aether across the earth. Where it lingered long enough, it crystallized in veins inside ordinary stone and netherrack — what surface miners now call $(l)Aether Shards$().

The shards themselves are inert until invoked, but they bind eagerly to magical resonance. Beacon bases, lanterns, glass windows, and (in coming expansions) advanced spell crafts all consume them.$(br2)$(o)"Hold one in your palm at dusk. You will feel an absence — the part of someone that is no longer there."$()
